title: Close P9 roadmap with Run script
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('governance/state/roadmap_state.json')
data = json.loads(p.read_text())
data['updated_at'] = now
data['cursor'] = 'BEM-525_P9_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL_CLOSED'
data['current_phase'] = 'P10'
data['phase_title'] = 'Production Stability'
data['blocker'] = None
pc = data.get('phases_completed', [])
if 'P9' not in pc:
    pc.append('P9')
data['phases_completed'] = pc
remaining = [x for x in data.get('phases_remaining', []) if x != 'P9']
if 'P10' not in remaining and 'P10' not in pc:
    remaining.insert(0, 'P10')
clean = []
for x in remaining:
    if x not in clean and x not in pc:
        clean.append(x)
data['phases_remaining'] = clean
for task in data.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('task_id') in ['P9_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL','P9_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL_CLAUDE_GPT']:
        task['task_id'] = 'P9_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL'
        task['status'] = 'completed'
        task['completed_at'] = now
    if task.get('task_id') == 'P10_PRODUCTION_STABILITY':
        task['status'] = 'pending'
p.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')
changed_files.append('governance/state/roadmap_state.json')
ops_applied.append('closed P9 and advanced roadmap to P10')
"""
No issue comments.
